title: Kubernetes
subtitle: Container orchestration platform API for managing clusters and workloads
comments: No fixed spec URL -- the OpenAPI spec is served dynamically by each cluster at /openapi/v2 or /openapi/v3. Skyline auto-detects by probing both endpoints. Initial detection works without auth (AllowUnauth) to confirm it's a Kubernetes API before requesting credentials.
authNotes: Requires a service account token or kubeconfig file. The Skyline admin UI supports pasting a kubeconfig to extract the token automatically.
